sbol:Collection.dcterms:title: CIDAR MoClo Plasmids Kit
sbol:Collection.dcterms:description: Collection of plamids from the MoClo kit.
sbol:Collection.dc:creator: Gonzalo Vidal

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: This is the backbone core for Destination Vector Ampicillin (DVA) plasmids. Based on the pSB1A2 plasmid and contains an ampicillin resistance gene and a high copy number origin of replication.
Ampicillin resistance gene from the pSB1A2 plasmid.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: B0033
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - Weiss RBS, low strength. Modified from Bba_B0033 to adjust spacing in MC system.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23106
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - medium strength

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E0030_yfp
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Fluorescent protein. Yellow.
Kanamycin resistance gene from the pSB1K3 plasmid.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E0040m_gfp
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Fluorescent protein. Green. Modified from Bba_E0040 to fix illegal site.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23116
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - low strength

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23100
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - high strength
This is the backbone core for Destination Vector Kanamycin (DVK) plasmids. Based on the pSB1K3 plasmid and contains kanamycin gene and a high copy number origin of replication.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E1010m_rfp
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Fluorescent protein. Red. Modified from Bba_E1010 to fix illegal sites.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: LacZ_cassette
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo IPTG inducible LacZ alpha subunit

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: B0032
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - Weiss RBS, medium strength. Modified from Bba_B0032 to adjust spacing in MC system.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: B0034
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - Weiss RBS, high strength. Modified from Bba_B0034 to adjust spacing in MC system.
Origin of replication from the pSB1A2/pSB1K3 plasmid. pSB1A2 is a high copy number plasmid. The replication origin is a pUC19-derived pMB1 (copy number of 100-300 per cell
